executionHistory.summary: Root-cause fix committed in 8ac848e1: pure canonicalizeSuccessfulCaptureResponse(resp, emittedAt) in internal/assistant/facade.go — a guard clause returns unchanged unless resp.CaptureRoute && Status==saved_as_idea, then it clears Sources/SourcesOverflowCount/ConfirmCard/DisambiguationPrompt/ErrorCause, sets the canonical captureFallbackAcknowledgement body + emittedAt, and preserves correlation (Invocation/Routing) + additive LegacyRetirementNotice. Invoked once at the facade boundary (Step 6->7) after successful no-ground persistence. No stubs/defaults/fallbacks (smackerel SST no-defaults).

Current-session RED->GREEN. RED: helper reduced to the pre-fix passthrough (return resp) -> TestCanonicalizeSuccessfulCaptureResponse_ClearsUpstreamFailureShape FAILs with error_cause=provider_unavailable + refusal body surviving (UNIT_RED_EXIT=1); the failure-branch test stayed GREEN even at RED (non-tautological). GREEN: fix restored (git checkout) -> adversarial + failure-branch + TestOpenKnowledgeNoGround (6 cases) all PASS (UNIT_GREEN_EXIT=0). Live e2e (isolated, disposable stack): TestAssistantHTTPE2E_CaptureFallbackOpenKnowledgeNoGround + TestAssistantHTTPE2E_CaptureAcknowledgementMatchesTelegramShape PASS (ok 13.666s, E2E_CAPTURE_EXIT=0). Evidence in report.md.

Full assistant e2e package = 62 PASS; capture path + every neighboring assistant product flow GREEN. The only 2 failures are the SAME pre-existing unrelated build-environment failure (TestIntentReplayE2E_* -> go build ./cmd/core inside the container fails with 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false') in a different subsystem, outside this change boundary, not caused by this change (working tree is packet-only), owned by concurrent spec069 deterministic-e2e work (G051 class). No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. The fix is a single ~16-line pure function plus one call site; a guard clause short-circuits the non-capture branch; no new types, abstraction, or indirection; it mirrors the existing response-construction pattern in the same file. Nothing to simplify.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: pure in-process response-field rewrite; zero Docker/Compose/container-lifecycle/schema/NATS/migration changes; no new persistent state; no shared-fixture coupling; deterministic (no I/O or concurrency; time is the passed emittedAt) and idempotent. The facade boots unchanged in every environment.
